channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: U.S., UK move to align rules for tokenized finance across world's largest financial markets
item.description: The joint roadmap aims to reduce regulatory friction for tokenized assets while strengthening ties between the world's two largest financial centers.

item.title: CleanSpark shares jump 22% after $6.6B Georgia data center lease
item.description: The Bitcoin miner’s Georgia agreement with an undisclosed investment-grade technology company expands its footprint in AI and high-performance computing infrastructure.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Senate has 24 days to pass the Crypto Clarity Act before leaving for summer recess. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE4wMEZhbGhualBPNEFmd2JFSDdjY3NLQmVLSmMzOFBSVHpqQmsyNkhCa09xODhZZjVRWFpxem9SaXphcUhCUmZBcWg3aS01VDRuYkpEUWdRRlQ4QkNnRm1HTEJB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Senate has 24 days t…

item.title: Bitcoin Ticks Up to $64K Following Largest Inflation Slowdown in Six Years
item.description: Consumer prices cooled more than expected in June, yet geopolitical tensions continue to cast a shadow over crypto prices

item.title: “Stern,” Likely Most Prolific Ransomware Operator Ever, Sanctioned by EU as Action Targets Billions in Ransomware Damage
item.description: Summary The United States, United Kingdom, and European Union announced sanctions targeting nation-state hackers, cybercriminals, and their enablers in one… The post “Stern,” Likely Most Prolific Ransomware Operator Ever, Sanctioned by EU …

item.title: UK to Defer Capital Gains Tax on DeFi Lending, Liquidity Pool Deposits
item.description: Moving crypto into a lending protocol or liquidity pool won’t count as a taxable disposal, deferring the charge until a real cash-out.

item.title: Anchorage Digital expands Tron support with institutional TRX staking
item.description: Institutions can now stake Tron's native token directly from Anchorage's custody platform as the company expands support for one of the largest USDT settlement networks.

item.title: JPMorgan says Hyperliquid's rise threatens Circle's USDC economics
item.description: Hyperliquid's deal with Circle and Coinbase creates a "prisoner's dilemma" that puts pressure on earnings from the dollar-pegged stablecoin.

item.title: Bitcoin jumps on lowest US CPI since 2020 as traders stay wary of $64K failure
item.description: BTC price action returned to $64,000 on low US CPI inflation but traders stayed wary of rejection at key resistance.

item.title: Just In: Coinbase Opens Registration to Users in China On July 14, multiple social media users reported that Coinbase had opened account registration to users in China. Wu Blockchain confirmed the change with Coinbase staff, who said users can now comp - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1zZVR5YWRzclBQMnZRWHVZdTRXZ2lxZ0FYWEdCcnZjVHRXY2ZCVkNKSmdReV81U3I2ZFZQdmNUQ0w3Z2FPc0M4Y1VVakJ1emJCRmtCUDRKYW9HeWstMmw0RHBXaw?oc=5" target="_blank">Just In: Coinbase Opens Registra…

item.title: Ethereum Foundation spinout EthSystems targets banks with blockchain privacy technology
item.description: The spinout comes amid one of the biggest organizational shakeups at the Ethereum Foundation in years.

item.title: For pension funds, tokenization’s real play is balance-sheet management, Fidelity’s Lai says
item.description: Fidelity International’s Giselle Lai argues that the most compelling long-term use case for tokenized funds is balance-sheet management for large, global institutions, not 24/7 liquidity.

item.title: Chainalysis Supports Stable with Automatic Token Support
item.description: Chainalysis is excited to announce support for Stable, a Layer 1 blockchain optimized for stablecoin payments and aligned with the… The post Chainalysis Supports Stable with Automatic Token Support appeared first on Chainalysis .

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin reclaims $64,000 and ETH reclaims $1,880 after US CPI posts its first monthly decline since the 2020. Bitcoin is up 2.24% in the last 1.5 hours, adding $28 billion to its market cap. ETH is up 4.88%, adding $10.8 billion. $134 million in short - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9IRm5sR3d6ekFFTXlHNkU2TXR1dFRGcEJOZFpHSGR0YWQ1MVRzTWxwU2hwVVAtS0tlZm1Jay1TbkV2ZnlWTmhMXzF6WHFqbklncE9nZm5STktYN3B0WFJTbnpSaw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin reclaims $64,0…

item.title: OpenAI quietly adds Kalshi World Cup odds to ChatGPT: Report
item.description: OpenAI’s ChatGPT now displays Kalshi’s World Cup prediction market odds in search results, marking the AI firm’s first reported deal with a prediction market platform.

item.title: Strategy became a symbol of the dot-com crash: Could history repeat?
item.description: MicroStrategy blew up during the dot-com era, before Michael Saylor transformed it into the world's largest corporate Bitcoin holder. Did he learn his lesson?

item.title: Humanity Protocol to prioritize operational security following $36M hack
item.description: Humanity Protocol’s founder said they will refocus on operational security, as malicious actors are switching from smart contract vulnerabilities to exploiting human behavior.

item.title: Hut 8 price target hiked to $165 at Benchmark as AI pivot reshapes valuation
item.description: Mark Palmer said Hut 8's Beacon Point project transforms the company into an AI infrastructure platform with a long growth runway.

item.title: U.S. June CPI fell 0.4%, likely cooling move toward Fed rate hikes
item.description: This morning's report could go a long way toward determining whether the Federal Reserve raises interest rates at its late-July meeting.

item.title: Morning Minute: Saylor's Strategy Hoards Cash, Doesn't Buy BTC
item.description: Strategy’s Bitcoin-buying machine stayed in neutral, while BTC and crypto majors chop and oil spikes ahead of a key CPI print this morning.

item.title: ECB picks firms including Deutsche Bank, Revolut for digital euro pilot
item.description: The pilot will test a beta version of the digital euro for online, offline, in-store, and e-commerce payments with ECB and central bank staff as users.

item.title: Japan’s biggest card network taps Circle to bring stablecoins to 40 million merchants
item.description: JCB and Circle will explore using USDC for cross-border payments and merchant transactions as Japan ramps up efforts to bring stablecoins into everyday commerce.

item.title: ABA, state banking groups push back on CLARITY Act stablecoin yield provisions
item.description: ABA and state banking associations published a joint letter calling for more detail on the CLARITY Act’s stablecoin yield provisions, ahead of the bill’s House hearing on Friday.

item.title: Solana community lead enters UK by-election with onchain transparency pitch
item.description: Superteam UK lead Stephen “Cap” Newnham is taking on Nigel Farage in the Clacton by-election with pledges on pension reform and onchain transparency.

item.title: ECB picks 36 payment providers to test digital euro ahead of 2027 pilot
item.description: The European Central Bank will beta test a digital euro with 36 providers, including Revolut, after the project drew more than 50 applications.

item.title: U.S.-Iran escalation weighs on bitcoin, stocks as oil climbs
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 14, 2026

item.title: US Government Moves $288M in Seized Crypto to Coinbase Prime
item.description: The seized coins landed at the government's custodian, which stops short of a sale but has revived questions about Trump's no-sell pledge.

item.title: Bitcoin's BIP-110 sparked a fight over who gets to decide the future of Bitcoin
item.description: BIP-110 sought to limit non-financial data on Bitcoin's blockchain but instead reignited debates over censorship and decentralization.

item.title: Prediction markets just crushed traditional sportsbooks in a massive $50 billion World Cup breakout
item.description: Prediction markets just topped $50 billion in monthly volume, capping off the first month of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

item.title: Bitcoin’s great rotation: Long-term holders pass supply to a new generation of buyers
item.description: Long-term holders are quietly transferring supply to a new generation of buyers, but looming Federal Reserve rate hikes could still trigger the capitulation markets have been waiting for.

item.title: AI has not triggered DeFi ‘hackpocalypse,’ Dragonfly partner says
item.description: Total value stolen and median hack size are declining compared to 2025, signaling that the AI hacking apocalypse was a false alarm, argued Dragonfly managing partner Haseeb Qureshi.

item.title: Bitcoin steadies at $62,600 as South Koreans flee stocks rout for crypto
item.description: Bitcoin consolidated after Monday's selloff as Donald Trump threatened more Iran strikes, gold extended its slide and a KOSPI index meltdown sent South Korean crypto volumes soaring.

item.title: XRP and ether bulls are getting louder as prices fall, signaling more trouble ahead
item.description: Social media chatter turned most bullish on XRP in five weeks even as the token fell, a setup that has historically favored sellers.

item.title: Hobby-level miner bags $200K solo BTC block with budget Bitaxe rig
item.description: A solo Bitcoin miner secured a $200,000 block reward with a budget mining rig, pushing payouts to hobby-level miners to $4.7 million for the past year.

item.title: Bitcoin bear market will bottom when two-month RSI metric hits zero, trader predicts
item.description: Bitcoin RSI continued to copy previous bear markets as a trader predicted that historical BTC price bottom signals would "happen again" in 2026.

item.title: South Korea to test tokenized government bonds with CBDC in 2027
item.description: South Korea will test tokenized government bonds linked to the Bank of Korea’s wholesale CBDC system in 2027 as token securities rules take effect.

item.title: US spot Bitcoin ETFs post $425M outflow after brief rebound
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs saw their largest single-day outflows in July, with $424.66 million leaving the funds, reversing a brief return to positive weekly flows.

item.title: From a crypto exchange to a financial platform for the next era of money. 9 years. $156.4T traded. 300M+ users. One ecosystem built around what you need next. The future of finance is being built by you. 💛 Explore the journey 👇 binance.com/en/blog/commun - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE51TU9iQlJTSEUtUGF2NzB4RlNqSVBBVXljOHhMLTFGR01HVnBlUDJGSEo1UWJkbTRsU28tMS1kdXpVX3hxd1VjR2Zmc2tJZ2l2TUlSczlRTm5kUHRK?oc=5" target="_blank">From a crypto exchange to a financial plat…

item.title: Live updates: Bitcoin rises past $64,000 after soft inflation data, Warsh testimony
item.description: Trump reinstated the Hormuz blockade, sending oil higher, reversing the peace trade that helped bitcoin recover in early July.

item.title: U.S. government moves $288 million in seized bitcoin, ether to Coinbase Prime
item.description: Coins from the Farace and BTC-e seizures moved through fresh wallets before landing on the exchange, despite president Donald Trump's previous no-sell reserve order.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Solo bitcoin miner makes $200,000 using $150 equipment
item.description: Solo Bitcoin mining has surged, with 24 blocks found in the past 12 months, a 41% increase year over year.

item.title: White House crypto adviser Patrick Witt to take military leave: Report
item.description: Witt’s departure comes during a critical moment for the CLARITY Act, with deputy director Harry Jung expected to assume his responsibilities.

item.title: US government moves $297M in seized Bitcoin, Ether to Coinbase Prime
item.description: The transfers have raised questions over Trump’s Bitcoin reserve pledge, though deposits to Coinbase Prime do not confirm an impending sale.

item.title: Bitcoin slips as traders lift July Fed rate hike bets ahead of Inflation report
item.description: Major cryptocurrencies have dropped by 2% or more in 24 hours as traders boosted bets of a July Fed rate hike.

item.title: 🚨SCOOP: Top White House Crypto Adviser to Take Military Leave as Clarity Act Enters Critical Stretch Crypto Council Executive Director @patrickjwitt will embark on a months-long leave later this month to begin Army National Guard JAG training. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE4waHVMUkd2X3JHbVpwblNVUXNUSW5XR3FyTnZSa1RqT1dhU2RQeHpibnJyRnlSdEllOTlkU2FVdC1hZGx3ZXUtbjRUNlVicDFtQzRfNGhWRFBUc0hrclJMR0I5bjVCQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨SCOOP: Top White House Cry…

item.title: Thai scammer's $122M wallet, Japan embraces crypto credit: Asia Express
item.description: Bitcoin backed mortgages and stablecoin yield are hot topics in Japan right now, as Hyundai experiments with Avalanche for global stablecoin transfers. Asia Express

item.title: CLARITY Act gains second law enforcement endorsement before Senate push
item.description: The Federal Law Enforcement Officers Association expressed support for the CLARITY Act but urged changes to the legislation’s language.

item.title: In my opinion, Ethereum L1 revenue fees should stay low to foster growth. Tens of thousands of companies will set up shop over the next 2-3 years on some mix of Ethereum L1, L2s, and private permissioned EVMs like Besu chains which will be fully interoper - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFA1bWJLbTBZblMzWjk5dUhfZTZYWGVUeUZiMzNUb3JJRFNSNi1WbGVGdnY0WDE4OTN3aFRNbE8xZlFuLU56MkdscTBUY2paNlhiR0M5R2hPdGpHUm95RS10MTE3NHRpUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">In my opinion, Ethereum L1 r…

item.title: This is actually crazy. Robinhood chain ( $HOOD ) just flipped Base and Ethereum to take the #2 spot in 24h DEX volume. This is the most active I've seen the trenches in a while. I'm personally throwing a few darts and DCAing into some top projects on the Ro - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE1pT1piWnJQXzZPdkNTc1hHanVtTnZhZjhxeWRuLVpCeWFwLVR6ckRtRjlwaktOZ3p6T0xma0JlRjRaSDQyajR5U0dPeXNod1pESk9sUFJuOEpTRldOc2NoX0hzS2lyZw?oc=5" target="_blank">This is actually crazy. Robi…

item.title: Bitcoin Covenants Part 4: OP_CHECKSIGFROMSTACK and OP_CAT
item.description: OP_CSFS authenticates signatures over arbitrary data. OP_CAT concatenates stack values into a single message. Together, they let Bitcoin scripts verify transaction structure at spend time, without pre-signed key management or new consensus…

item.title: Stop Over-Prompting: OpenAI’s New GPT-5.6 Guidelines Change Everything
item.description: Forget the XML blocks and persistence scripts. OpenAI’s new prompting guide says define the destination, set the stopping conditions, and get out of the way.

item.title: The Robinhood Chain is the cleanest case study of what happened to ETH's economics over time. Since inception, @RobinhoodApp Chain has grossed ~$816K in revenue. @Arbitrum, the middleware provider, takes 10%: ~$80K. Arbitrum then pays Ethereu - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE56b0hEWGhHcTZOSDF1cUJaQTJLTkkyZS1ieHNyeGdFQmEwN3JhaEFmQmdvbU5ESmhMTkJyNERuMmlLMkJKakRaemYydmdJQzNvT2xZOU9LeVBwWUV4YmVUUA?oc=5" target="_blank">The Robinhood Chain is the cleanest …

item.title: Protesters March on OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google DeepMind Demanding AI Development Pause
item.description: About 200 protesters marched through San Francisco on Saturday, calling on leading AI companies to halt development of more powerful models over concerns about AI safety, jobs, and the environment.

item.title: New Hampshire Follows Bitcoin Reserve With 'Blockchain Basic Laws' Signing
item.description: New Hampshire's newly-signed crypto law introduces protections for users, miners, and stakers within its boundaries.

item.title: Claude's Personality Changes Depending on the Model—And the Language You Speak
item.description: According to new Anthropic research, Claude consistently expresses different values across models and languages.

item.title: Binance.US CEO says exchange is rebuilding, eyes return to 20% U.S. market share
item.description: Binance.US is betting ultra-low fees, new regulated products and deeper liquidity will help it regain customers after two years of regulatory setbacks.

item.title: Franklin Crypto CIO says crypto prices are disconnected from fundamentals
item.description: Institutional adoption of crypto is accelerating even as digital asset prices fail to reflect the industry's strongest fundamentals in years, Seth Ginns said.

item.title: Democratic Opposition to Clarity Act Grows in Crypto Bill's Do-or-Die Final Weeks
item.description: Democrats are mounting a final case against the Clarity Act centered on its lack of language restricting Trump's sprawling crypto fortune.

item.title: Crypto funds are showing their first signs of a recovery: Crypto ETFs attracted +$281.8 million in inflows last week, the first weekly inflow since the 2nd week of May. Bitcoin funds posted +$197.4 million in inflows, while Ethereum funds attracted +$84.4 million. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9GMjFPMFBDb1BsdDRXbGRsM0pxYVJsVlJrZGh2anpXWnNaM1plZktUby1aZld1cE9ORU82NWpzOF9MYy12RFZLdTRMcHVnRnZvYk4tY0hrRDhiQ1k5U1otSFRpaV9sZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto funds are showing the…
